title: Compound Matter Universe
description: A set of FICTIONAL legal matters that are intertwined: they share one cast of people and organizations and cross-reference one another, modeling how a single real-world event cascades across practice areas (e.g. a death -> probate + estate tax + guardianship). Each entry in `matters` is itself a full Mock Matter validating against mock_matter.schema.json; validate those separately.

universe_id.description: Stable id shared by every matter in this universe.

theme.description: The precipitating event / through-line that ties the matters together.

narrative.description: Plain-language overview of how the matters interrelate.

cast.description: The shared people and organizations. Each appears in one or more matters under possibly different roles.

name.description: Display name (full name or organization name).

role.description: Role key that this cast member fills in that matter.

matters.description: The constituent Mock Matters. Each is independently valid against mock_matter.schema.json and carries matter.universe_id + related_matters back-links.
